playbook.intent: Pile of raw interview audio -> tagged insight bank + prioritized design backlog.
playbook.scope: Designer or researcher synthesizes a batch of N interviews using an AI pipeline plus human validation. Includes ingestion, AI tagging, human triage, affinity diagramming, thematic analysis, mixed-methods triangulation, repository update, and backlog tickets. Done when insights are filed and tickets are queued.

success-criteria.criterion: Design backlog tickets created for top themes

stage.name: Ingest
stage.intent: Get audio + transcripts into one place.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all interviews are ingested.

stage.name: AI code

tasks.task: Save AI output to working file

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after AI run completes.

stage.name: Human triage
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when validation rate is >=80%.

stage.name: Affinity + thematic
stage.intent: Group codes into themes with structure.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each theme has >=3 evidence points.

stage.name: Triangulate
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when triangulation pass is recorded.

stage.name: Repo + tickets
stage.intent: Make the synthesis usable next sprint.

tasks.task: Open design backlog tickets per top theme
Brief design + PM on top themes

stage.decision-gate: Done when top themes have tickets.

extra.value: [Accepting AI codes blindly -> phantom themes, No triangulation -> over-weighting interview noise, No tickets -> synthesis dies on the shelf]
['Is validation rate >=80%?', 'Are themes backed by >=3 evidence?', 'Did top themes become backlog tickets?']

{human: faion get-content ai-assisted-research-synthesis-interview-transcripts-tagged-insights-design-back --format md, agent: faion get-content ai-assisted-research-synthesis-interview-transcripts-tagged-insights-design-back --format context, json: faion get-content ai-assisted-research-synthesis-interview-transcripts-tagged-insights-design-back --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
